title: Twilight Blue Bolsius Rustic Shine Pillar Candle (80mm x 68mm)
features: Unscented Ambiance: With its large flame and soft light, this unscented pillar candle brings a cozy and relaxing atmosphere to any environment, perfect for setting the mood for a quiet evening or a romantic dinner.

Rustic Design: Inspired by the colors and textures of nature, this rustic candle range from Bolsius features a unique and stylish design that will add a touch of elegance to any room, making it a great addition to your home decor.
Optimal Size: Measuring 8cm in width and 6.8cm in height, this pillar candle is the perfect size to place on your table, shelf, or mantelpiece, providing you with long-lasting light and warmth.
Safe Indoor Use: Designed for indoor use only, this pillar candle is safe to use in your home, and with its one cotton wick, you can enjoy a clean and even burn every time.
description: Product description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 8cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, never leave a burning candle unattended, monitor burn time, properly dispose of candle remnants, and keep out of reach of children and pets.
